---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for the High Tech, Low Lives web application
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: ['enhancement', 'needs-triage']
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see implemented.

## User Story
As a [player/GM/developer], I want [goal] so that [benefit].

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Technical Considerations
- **Affected Components**: (e.g., character sheet, playbook selector, stress tracker)
- **Data Requirements**: (e.g., new data structures, API changes)
- **UI/UX Impact**: (e.g., new screens, modified workflows)

## Design Requirements
- **Visual Style**: How should this fit the duotone cyberpunk aesthetic?
- **Responsive Behavior**: Mobile and desktop considerations
- **Print Impact**: Does this affect print-friendly export?

## Priority
- [ ] Critical (blocks other work)
- [ ] High (important for MVP)
- [ ] Medium (nice to have)
- [ ] Low (future enhancement)

## Additional Context
Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request here.
